title: diplostephium floribundum subsp. aequatoriense
intro: Diplostephium floribundum subsp. aequatoriense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Ecuador. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Diplostephium floribundum subsp. aequatoriense include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments, and its leaves and stems are also used in herbal preparations to create teas, tinctures, and poultices.
